title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository – the self-contained CLI + server that lets you pull, run and fine-tune large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama, exposing sync & async APIs to chat, generate, embed and manage models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers, providing a typed SDK around the Ollama REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that adds Ollama as a first-class LLM provider for chains, agents and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: A full-featured, self-hosted ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-user support and model management.

title: chainlit + Ollama cookbook
summary: Recipes showing how to power Chainlit conversational apps entirely with local Ollama models.

title: llama-cpp-ollama
summary: Experimental llama.cpp server mode that exposes the same REST endpoints as Ollama for drop-in compatibility.

title: semantic-kernel-ollama
summary: Microsoft Semantic Kernel .NET example demonstrating how to plug Ollama models into planners and plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Idiomatic Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starters and reactive extensions.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: A rich terminal chat client built on top of the Ollama API with syntax highlighting and conversation saving.

title: ollama-telegram-bot
summary: Self-hosted Telegram bot that forwards messages to a local Ollama instance and streams replies back to users.

title: ollama-rag-langchain
summary: End-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation demo using Ollama embeddings + LLM with LangChain and Chroma.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that replaces GitHub Copilot with local Ollama models for code completions and chat.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker images and compose stacks for running Ollama with GPU passthrough (Nvidia & AMD) on Linux & macOS.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration that brings Ollama models to pipelines for QA, summarization and RAG.

title: ollama-on-rails
summary: Ruby on Rails gem that wraps the Ollama REST API and adds ActiveModel-compatible helpers for Rails apps.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: Minimal FastAPI server example showing how to embed Ollama generation endpoints into a larger Python micro-service.
